case_title: LORETTA LEE VS. TENJIN, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEE, LORETTA AS TO DEFENDANT TENJIN, INC. MANJI, AMIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-21-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANJI, AMIR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LORETTA LEE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS AMIR MANJI AND TENJIN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE CHRISTOPHER FARM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, LORETTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENJIN, INC. MANJI, AMIR $5,670.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,805.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $30.00 SERVED OCT-21-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TENJIN, INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/09/16/. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NO MAIL RECEPTACLE."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TENJIN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
